⚠️ Buttons Not Working?
This app requires Safari to work.
Follow these steps on your iPhone:
1
Tap the Share button at the bottom of your screen ⬆ (the box with an arrow)
2
Scroll down and tap "Open in Safari" 🧭
3
Optional: In Safari, tap Share again → "Add to Home Screen" to make an app icon 📱

IND✈️BWI
Southwest Airlines · Flight #1140 · Basic · Est. 1h 35m
🛫Departs: Indianapolis (IND) at 12:30 PM
🛬Arrives: Baltimore/Washington (BWI) at 2:05 PM
🚗Then: Travel from BWI → IAD (Dulles) — about 45–60 min by car/shuttle. Ethiopian Airlines check-in at IAD opens 3 hrs before the 10:55 AM departure tomorrow.
🏨 Tonight's Stay — Hampton Inn & Suites
Hotel: Hampton Inn & Suites Glenarden-Washington DC
Address: 2901 Campus Way N, Glenarden MD 20706
Confirmation #: 81041163
Check-in: April 17 · Arrive 2:30 PM
Check-out: April 18 (1 night)
📞 +1 301-322-3200 📍 Directions

📍 BWI Airport 📍 Dulles Airport (IAD) 🌐 Southwest Airlines
🌤️
Weather Forecast
72°F/22°C Clear skies at Dulles. Comfortable spring day. Cabin temp on overnight flight will be cool.
👗
What to Wear
Comfortable travel clothes — loose layers you can add/remove on the plane. Slip-on shoes for security. Bring a light cardigan or jacket for the cold cabin. Compression socks recommended for the 13-hour flight.
💵
Money & Currency
USD ✓ US Dollars only. Exchange rate: Not yet needed. Tip: Get some South African Rand (ZAR) at Dulles airport or on arrival in Johannesburg.

🕙Depart: Washington Dulles (IAD) at 10:55 AM

📋Tip: Arrive at IAD at least 3 hours early for international departure. Ethiopian Airlines check-in is at the international terminal.
📍 Dulles Airport (IAD) 🌐 Ethiopian Airlines
🌤️
Weather Forecast
75°F/24°C Addis Ababa: Warm & partly cloudy. 72°F/22°C Johannesburg: Mild autumn afternoon, comfortable.
👗
What to Wear
Stay in your travel clothes from the flight — you're in transit at Addis. On arrival in Johannesburg: light layers work well. The hotel will be climate-controlled.
💵
Money & Currency
ETB Ethiopian Birr at Addis (transit — you won't need any). ZAR South African Rand at JNB. 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR. USD not widely accepted in shops — exchange at the airport.
ADD✈️JNB
Ethiopian Airlines ET 809 · Departs ADD 8:45 AM → Arrives JNB 1:05 PM · 5h 20m · Seat 2 pieces 57K

✈️Depart ADD: 8:45 AM → Arrive OR Tambo (JNB): 1:05 PM

Tonight's Hotel
🏨 Garden Court OR Tambo · Johannesburg
✈️ Onboard meals
📍 Hotel Map 📍 OR Tambo Airport
🌤️
Weather Forecast
84°F/29°C Kruger area: Hot & sunny with possible afternoon clouds. Low humidity. Beautiful game-drive weather.
👗
What to Wear
🟫 SAFARI COLORS ONLY — khaki, tan, olive green, brown, beige. Avoid white, bright colors, or red (attracts insects, disturbs animals). Light long-sleeve shirt for sun protection. Comfortable closed-toe shoes. Wide-brim hat. Sunglasses. Sunscreen SPF 50+.
💵
Money & Currency
ZAR South African Rand everywhere. Lodge accepts credit cards. ATMs available in Hazyview. 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR. Carry some ZAR cash for small purchases.
🍳Breakfast & check out
👋Meet your English-speaking guide in the lobby
🏙️Orientation drive through Pretoria — South Africa's capital city
🏔️Blyde River Canyon — Three Rondavels viewpoint, one of Africa's natural wonders
🌅God's Window — breathtaking panoramic view of mountains & fertile plains
🌿Drive to Hazyview/Kruger area for overnight
Tonight's Hotel
🦁 Skukuza Safari Lodge · Kruger National Park
🍳 Breakfast🍽️ Dinner
📍 Three Rondavels 📍 God's Window 📍 Skukuza Lodge
🌤️
Weather Forecast
86°F/30°C Sunny & warm with clear skies — excellent for game viewing. Cooler at dawn (60°F/15°C) for early drive. Stay hydrated!
👗
What to Wear
🟫 Safari neutrals — khaki/beige/olive long-sleeve shirt, comfortable pants or shorts. Layer up for the cool early morning drive, shed layers by midday. No white or bright colors! Closed shoes, hat, sunglasses. Insect repellent. Camera strap over shoulder.
💵
Money & Currency
ZAR Rand accepted everywhere in park. Lodge, gift shops, and restaurant accept credit cards. Tip guides in ZAR or USD (guides appreciate R200-300/person for full day). 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR.
🍳Early breakfast
🦁Full-day game drive in Kruger National Park in air-conditioned vehicle
🐘Big Five: Elephant 🐘 · Buffalo 🐃 · Lion 🦁 · Leopard 🐆 · Rhino 🦏
🦒Also watch for: Giraffes, zebras, hippos, crocodiles, wild dogs & 500+ bird species
🌅Evening back at lodge — enjoy the sunset over the savanna
📷Photography tips: Bring zoom lens, best light is early morning & late afternoon
Tonight's Hotel
🦁 Skukuza Safari Lodge · Kruger National Park
🍳 Breakfast🍽️ Dinner
📍 Kruger National Park
🌤️
Weather Forecast
70°F/21°C Cape Town: Cool autumn afternoon with sea breeze. Can be windy. Possible light rain — pack a layer!
👗
What to Wear
Travel clothes for the morning flight. Cape Town arrival: Light jacket or cardigan — the sea breeze makes 70°F feel cooler. Comfortable walking shoes. Layers are key in Cape Town — it can change quickly!
💵
Money & Currency
ZAR South African Rand throughout Cape Town. All hotels & restaurants accept Visa/Mastercard. ATMs are plentiful. 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR. USD not accepted at shops.
🍳Breakfast & check out
🚗Transfer to Kruger Mpumalanga International Airport (MQP) · Check-in by 11:25 AM
MQP✈️CPT
Airlink Flight 4Z664 · Departs 1:25 PM → Arrives 4:05 PM · Duration 2h 40m · 20kg baggage
🎫 Airlink · Booking Ref: XSRO6Z · Class L · 20kg baggage

🚗Transfer from Cape Town International Airport to hotel
🏨Check in & group dinner at hotel
Tonight's Hotel (5 nights)
🏨 Southern Sun Cape Sun · Cape Town City Center
🍳 Breakfast🍽️ Dinner
📍 MQP Airport 📍 Cape Town Airport 📍 Hotel Map
🌤️
Weather Forecast
68°F/20°C Partly cloudy — Table Mountain can make its own cloud cover ("tablecloth"). Check mountain conditions before cable car. Light wind. Bring a layer!
👗
What to Wear
Comfortable walking shoes (lots of walking today!). Light jacket — can be windy at Table Mountain summit (bring an extra layer). Comfortable jeans or pants. Cape Town is stylish — smart casual for dinner. Sunscreen even on cloudy days.
💵
Money & Currency
ZAR Rand everywhere. Table Mountain cable car accepts credit cards (R420/person adult). Bo-Kaap area — carry small ZAR for local shops. V&A Waterfront accepts all major cards. 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR.
🍳Breakfast at hotel
🏘️Bo-Kaap: Famous for colorful houses, Georgian architecture & cobblestone roads
⚓Victoria & Alfred Waterfront: Perched on Atlantic shore at Table Bay Harbor — shops, restaurants & views
🚠Table Mountain Cable Car: Ride to the summit — one of the New Seven Wonders of the World! Views extend to Cape of Good Hope
🌊Camps Bay: Iconic beachfront strip with posh seafood restaurants, cafes & cocktail bars
⚠️Cable Car tip: Check weather before going — it closes in high winds. Book ahead if possible.
Tonight's Hotel
🏨 Southern Sun Cape Sun · Cape Town
🍳 Breakfast🍽️ Dinner (Camps Bay)
📍 Bo-Kaap 📍 V&A Waterfront 📍 Table Mountain 📍 Camps Bay
🌤️
Weather Forecast
65°F/18°C Cape of Good Hope: Windier than the city — gusts common at the Cape. Partly sunny. Boulders Beach: Similar. Bring a windbreaker!
👗
What to Wear
🌬️ Wind-proof jacket essential — the Cape of Good Hope is one of the windiest places in South Africa. Layers underneath. Comfortable walking shoes (rocky paths). Hat that won't blow away (or skip it). Comfortable pants. Camera strap secured!
💵
Money & Currency
ZAR Cape Point entry: R353/person (Table Mountain National Park). Boulders Beach penguins: R244/person. Bring ZAR cash or credit card. Simon's Town restaurants accept cards. 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR.
🍳Breakfast at hotel
🌊Scenic drive along Chapmans Peak Drive (weather permitting) — one of world's most dramatic coastal roads
⛵Cape of Good Hope: Southernmost tip of the Cape Peninsula — the "Cape of Storms"
🚞Optional: Cog rail train or walk to lighthouse viewpoint (highly recommended)
🐧Boulders Beach: African Penguin Colony — walk among hundreds of wild penguins!
🍽️Dinner in Fish Hoek — charming seaside town with sandy beaches & clear turquoise water
Tonight's Hotel
🏨 Southern Sun Cape Sun · Cape Town
🍳 Breakfast🍽️ Dinner (Fish Hoek)
📍 Chapmans Peak 📍 Cape of Good Hope 📍 Boulders Beach 🐧 📍 Fish Hoek
🌤️
Weather Forecast
66°F/19°C Cape Town: Partly cloudy, sea breezy. Robben Island ferry: Ocean can be choppy — take motion sickness precaution if sensitive.
👗
What to Wear
Warm layers for the Robben Island ferry ride — the Atlantic Ocean is cold and windy! Wind-resistant jacket, comfortable walking shoes for the island tour. Smart casual for GOLD Restaurant dinner in the evening (they provide Zulu ceremonial wear for the experience!).
💵
Money & Currency
ZAR Robben Island tickets: R620/person (includes ferry + tour). GOLD Restaurant: R850-1,200/person including show. Book ahead — they accept credit cards. 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR.
🍳Breakfast at hotel
⛵Robben Island Ferry from Nelson Mandela Gateway at V&A Waterfront
🏛️Tour of Maximum Security Prison (now a museum) — guides are former political prisoners
✊Visit Nelson Mandela's cell — where he spent 18 years of imprisonment
🎭Free time in Cape Town afternoon
🥁GOLD Restaurant evening: Interactive djembe drumming session + authentic African feast + live entertainment
Tonight's Hotel
🏨 Southern Sun Cape Sun · Cape Town
🍳 Breakfast🥁 Dinner at GOLD Restaurant
📍 Ferry Departure 📍 Robben Island 📍 GOLD Restaurant
🌤️
Weather Forecast
67°F/19°C Free day in Cape Town — typical autumn mix. Mornings can be crisp. Afternoon likely pleasant. Check weather app for latest.
👗
What to Wear
Perfect day for the V&A Waterfront or shopping! Smart casual — Cape Town is fashionable. Light jacket in the morning. Comfortable walking shoes. If visiting wine estates: smart casual (avoid shorts at upscale restaurants).
💵
Money & Currency
ZAR V&A Waterfront: all cards accepted. Canal Walk Mall: all cards. Markets: carry ZAR cash. Uber/Bolt: app payment. ATMs everywhere. Tip at restaurants: 10-15%. 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR.
🍳Breakfast at hotel
😊The day is all yours! Rest, explore, or take in more of Cape Town at your own pace
💡Suggestions: Kirstenbosch Gardens · Signal Hill sunset · Cape Town Market · Green Point Park · Two Oceans Aquarium · Local shopping on Long Street
👨‍💼Guide available to help with suggestions & arrangements
Tonight's Hotel
🏨 Southern Sun Cape Sun · Cape Town
🍳 Breakfast only
📍 Kirstenbosch Gardens 📍 Signal Hill
🌤️
Weather Forecast
69°F/21°C Stellenbosch: Sunny autumn day — the wine country is gorgeous in fall. Warm afternoons, cool evenings. Perfect vineyard weather.
👗
What to Wear
🍷 Smart casual for wine tasting — avoid shorts at formal wine estates. Light dress or neat pants + blouse for ladies. Chinos + polo or button shirt for gentlemen. Comfortable flat shoes (walking through vineyards). Light cardigan for cool cellar tours.
💵
Money & Currency
ZAR All wine estates accept credit cards. Tastings: R200-400/person. Many estates have excellent restaurants — book ahead. Small tip (R20-50) for pourer appreciated. 1 USD ≈ 18.5 ZAR.
🍳Breakfast & check out from Cape Sun
🚗Drive to South African wine region (approx. 45 min from Cape Town)
🍷Meet local vintner — learn about South Africa's unique climate (300 days of sunshine/year!)
🍇In-depth wine tasting: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Pinotage, Syrah & Chardonnay
🍽️Dinner in the heart of wine country
Tonight's Hotel
🏡 Jordan Luxury Suites · Stellenbosch
🍳 Breakfast🍽️ Dinner
📍 Jordan Luxury Suites 📍 Stellenbosch Wine Region
🌤️
Weather Forecast
84°F/29°C Victoria Falls: Hot & very humid. End of wet season — falls at PEAK FLOW. Expect spray to drench you! Warm evenings.
👗
What to Wear
⚠️ Victoria Falls packing essentials: Quick-dry clothes (you WILL get soaked by falls spray). Waterproof sandals or shoes. Waterproof poncho/rain jacket (mandatory for Knife's Edge walk!). Swimwear for hotel pool. Light breathable fabrics — it's HOT.
💵
Money & Currency
🇿🇼 USD is the PRIMARY currency in Zimbabwe! USD ✓ Primary Also accepts ZAR, Euro, and Botswana Pula. Zimbabwe does NOT use their own dollar for tourism. Bring USD $100-200 cash. Credit cards accepted at hotels & main restaurants.
🍳Final breakfast in South Africa
🚗Transfer to Cape Town International Airport (CPT) · Check-in by 7:45 AM
CPT✈️VFA

👋Met by representative at Victoria Falls Airport
💧Guided tour of Victoria Falls — locally called Mosi-oa-Tunya ("The Smoke That Thunders") — one of the 7 Wonders of the World! Nearly 2km wide, falls 100m to the Zambezi River
🏨Check in & relax at hotel
🚢Zambezi River Sunset Dinner Cruise: Hippos, crocs, elephants, spectacular sunset & 3-course dinner — included!
✅Zimbabwe eTA: Pre-approved! Show QR codes above to immigration. KAZA UniVisa covers Zimbabwe & Botswana.
Tonight's Hotel
🦁 Batonka Guest Lodge · Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe
🍳 Breakfast🍽️ Dinner (Cruise)
📍 Victoria Falls 📍 Batonka Lodge 📍 Zambezi River
🌤️
Weather Forecast
88°F/31°C Chobe/Botswana: Very warm & humid. End of rainy season — lush green park, excellent wildlife viewing at the river. Afternoon heat.
👗
What to Wear
🟫 Safari neutrals for Chobe! Khaki, beige, olive. Light breathable long-sleeve shirt (sun + insects). Comfortable pants or safari shorts. Hat, sunglasses, SPF 50+. Comfortable shoes. Boat safari: Lightweight clothes, the river is beautiful.
💵
Money & Currency
Pula Botswana Pula (BWP) official. USD ✓ Tourist areas USD accepted at Chobe National Park & lodges. ZAR ZAR also accepted. 1 USD ≈ 13.6 BWP. Your tour operator likely handles fees.
🍳Breakfast & check out
🇧🇼Cross border into Botswana — Chobe National Park (have passports ready)
🚢Chobe River boat cruise: Elephants, hippos, crocs, and extraordinary birdlife right from the water
🍽️Fantastic included lunch at a lodge on the river's edge
🦒Afternoon game drive in open safari vehicles — Chobe has Africa's largest elephant population!
🏨Return to Victoria Falls — luggage delivered to new lodge
Tonight's Hotel
🏡 Bayete Guest Lodge · Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe
🍳 Breakfast🍽️ Lunch (included)
📍 Chobe National Park 📍 Bayete Lodge
🌤️
Weather Forecast
84°F/29°C Victoria Falls morning: Warm & humid. Final morning — enjoy the mist from the falls one last time before the flight.
👗
What to Wear
Comfortable travel clothes for the long journey home. Fresh change after morning activities. Layers for the plane. Keep your most comfortable clothes accessible.
💵
Money & Currency
USD ✓ Spend remaining USD or ZAR at Victoria Falls souvenir market (excellent for gifts — bargaining expected!). Airport shops accept USD. Save receipts for customs.
🍳Breakfast & check out at 10:00 AM
🚗Transfer to Victoria Falls Airport

🌤️
Weather Forecast
65°F/18°C Washington DC in May: Mild spring day. Light jacket useful for the drive home.
👗
What to Wear
Whatever's comfortable after the long flight! Light spring jacket for the Washington DC weather. Welcome home! 🎉
💵
Money & Currency
USD ✓ Back to US Dollars! Declare any goods over $800 to customs. Keep all receipts from your trip for customs declaration.

🍽️ Explore
⭐ Ranked by popularity with tourists. Tap 📍 to open in Apple Maps.
1
Marble Restaurant
Wood-fired steaks & seafood with stunning Joburg skyline views. One of SA's top restaurants.
SteakhouseFine DiningRooftop
📍 Map 📞 Call
2
Tashas Cafe
Beloved SA chain — fresh salads, pastas, great coffee. Perfect for a relaxed lunch. Multiple locations.
CaféAll-Day DiningFamily Friendly
📍 Map
3
Moyo Zoo Lake
Magical African dining experience outdoors by the lake. Pan-African cuisine, face painting & traditional entertainment.
AfricanOutdoorScenic
📍 Map
4
Nando's Chicken
South Africa's iconic peri-peri flame-grilled chicken chain — a true local institution!
CasualLocal FavoriteQuick Meal
📍 Map
5
Osteria Rossa
Award-winning Italian in Sandton. Authentic pasta, wood-fired pizza & excellent wine list.
ItalianAward-WinningSandton
📍 Map
1
GOLD Restaurant ⭐ (On Tour)
African feast with live djembe drumming & entertainment. Already included on Day 8 — a must-experience!
AfricanEntertainmentIncluded Day 8
📍 Map 📞 Call
2
Harbour House (V&A Waterfront)
Cape Town's finest seafood restaurant with harbour views. Famous for fresh fish, sushi & oysters.
SeafoodWaterfrontViews
📍 Map
3
Willoughby & Co (V&A Waterfront)
Cape Town institution for sushi & seafood. Casual, excellent value, always busy — go early or book!
SushiSeafoodCasual
📍 Map
4
The Pot Luck Club (Woodstock)
Trendy tapas-style dining in a converted Biscuit Mill. Vibrant atmosphere, creative small plates.
TapasTrendyDinner
📍 Map
5
Karibu Restaurant
Authentic Cape Malay cuisine in historic Bo-Kaap. "Karibu" means "welcome" in Swahili.
Cape MalayBo-KaapLocal
📍 Map
6
Camps Bay restaurants (strip)
Beachfront strip lined with restaurants — The Codfather, Zenzero, Camp's Bay Retreat. All excellent for seafood & sunsets.
BeachfrontSeafoodSunset Views
📍 Map
1
Jordan Restaurant ⭐ (At Your Hotel)
One of SA's best farm-to-table restaurants on the Jordan wine estate — where you're staying on Day 10!
Fine DiningWine PairingAt Hotel
📍 Map
2
Terroir at Kleine Zalze
Beautifully situated wine estate restaurant. Seasonal French-inspired menu with estate wines.
FrenchWine EstateScenic
📍 Map
3
Rust en Vrede Restaurant
Internationally acclaimed, consistently rated among Africa's best. Elegant estate dining.
Fine DiningAward-WinningEstate
📍 Map
4
Tokara Wine Estate Restaurant
Hilltop restaurant with magnificent views of Stellenbosch valley. Mediterranean-inspired cuisine.
MediterraneanHilltop ViewsWine
📍 Map
1
Skukuza Safari Lodge Restaurant ⭐ (Your Hotel)
Dinners on the deck overlooking the bush. Buffet & à la carte with African-inspired dishes. Already included!
Bush DiningBuffetIncluded
📍 Map
2
Cattle Baron Hazyview
Famous SA steakhouse chain, Hazyview branch. Excellent grilled meats in casual atmosphere.
SteakhouseCasualPopular
📍 Map
3
Hippo Hollow Country Estate
Lovely riverside setting for lunch or dinner. Watch hippos from your table along the Sabie River!
RiversideScenicWildlife Viewing
📍 Map
1
The Lookout Café
Perched on the edge of Batoka Gorge with direct views of the Falls. Best spot for lunch with a view!
Gorge ViewsLunchIconic
📍 Map
2
The Boma Dinner & Drum Show
Open-air African dining experience with traditional drumming, dancing & local cuisine. A Victoria Falls staple.
African CuisineEntertainmentOutdoor
📍 Map
3
Victoria Falls Hotel Terrace
Afternoon tea or cocktails on the grand colonial terrace. Classic elegance with views of the bridge & gorge.
Afternoon TeaColonial HeritageViews
📍 Map
4
Mama Africa Restaurant
Laid-back spot for local Zimbabwean dishes — sadza, warthog, impala & other game meats. Adventurous dining!
Local CuisineGame MeatCasual
📍 Map
1
Apartheid Museum
Powerful and moving museum documenting the rise and fall of apartheid. One of Africa's finest museums. Allow 3 hours.
MuseumHistoryMust-See
📍 Map
2
Union Buildings — Pretoria
Iconic seat of South African government. Home to Nelson Mandela's inauguration site. Beautiful gardens & statues.
LandmarkPretoriaHistory
📍 Map
3
Voortrekker Monument — Pretoria
Massive granite monument honoring Boer pioneers. Sweeping views of Pretoria from the top.
MonumentHistoryViews
📍 Map
4
Soweto Township
Visit Vilakazi Street — the only street where two Nobel Peace Prize winners were born (Mandela & Tutu). Vibrant culture.
CulturalHistoryTour
📍 Map
5
Gold Reef City
Built on a real gold mine. Theme park, casino & underground mine tours. Great for understanding Joburg's gold rush history.
HistoryEntertainmentMine Tour
📍 Map
1
Table Mountain ⭐ (On Tour Day 6)
New 7 Wonders of Nature. Cable car to the summit for 360° views over Cape Town, ocean & Cape Peninsula.
Natural WonderCable CarIncluded Day 6
📍 Map
2
Cape of Good Hope ⭐ (On Tour Day 7)
Dramatic cliffs where two oceans meet. Walk to the lighthouse for breathtaking views. One of Africa's icons.
NaturalIconicIncluded Day 7
📍 Map
3
Robben Island ⭐ (On Tour Day 8)
UNESCO World Heritage Site. Nelson Mandela's prison — one of the most powerful historical sites in the world.
UNESCOHistoryIncluded Day 8
📍 Map
4
Boulders Beach — African Penguins ⭐ (Day 7)
Walk among a colony of endangered African penguins on a protected beach near Simon's Town. Absolutely delightful!
WildlifeBeachIncluded Day 7
📍 Map
5
Kirstenbosch National Botanical Garden
World-renowned gardens on the eastern slopes of Table Mountain. Stunning landscapes, treetop walkway & open-air concerts.
GardensUNESCOPeaceful
📍 Map
6
V&A Waterfront
Vibrant harbour precinct — shopping, restaurants, Two Oceans Aquarium & stunning mountain backdrop.
ShoppingHarbourRestaurants
📍 Map
7
Two Oceans Aquarium
Exceptional aquarium at the V&A Waterfront. Sharks, rays, penguins & colorful displays. Great for a few hours.
AquariumRainy DayFamily
📍 Map
1
Stellenbosch Wine Route ⭐ (On Tour Day 10)
Over 200 wine estates within a short drive. Some of Africa's finest wines in a beautiful valley setting.
WineScenicIncluded Day 10
📍 Map
2
Franschhoek Village
"French Corner" — charming village of Huguenot heritage with art galleries, gourmet restaurants & wine trams.
VillageFrench HeritageCharming
📍 Map
3
Spier Wine Estate
One of the Cape's oldest wine estates. Wine tasting, cheetah outreach, eagle encounters & a lovely farm market.
WineCheetahsFamily-Friendly
📍 Map
1
Kruger National Park — Game Drive ⭐ (Day 4)
Africa's most famous game reserve. Big Five, 500+ bird species, incredible ecosystems. One of the world's top safari destinations.
SafariBig FiveIncluded Day 4
📍 Map
2
Blyde River Canyon ⭐ (Day 3)
One of Africa's great natural wonders. Third-largest canyon in the world. Three Rondavels viewpoint is breathtaking.
Natural WonderCanyonIncluded Day 3
📍 Map
3
God's Window ⭐ (Day 3)
Dramatic escarpment viewpoint with views stretching to Mozambique on a clear day. One of SA's most iconic views.
ViewpointPanoramicIncluded Day 3
📍 Map
4
Bourke's Luck Potholes
Extraordinary cylindrical rock formations carved by river whirlpools at the confluence of two rivers. Unique geological wonder.
GeologyUniqueScenic
📍 Map
1
Victoria Falls ⭐ (On Tour Day 11)
One of the Seven Wonders of the World — "The Smoke That Thunders." Almost 2km wide, 100m drop. Simply magnificent.
World WonderUNESCOIncluded Day 11
📍 Map
2
Chobe National Park, Botswana ⭐ (Day 12)
Africa's largest elephant population. Outstanding riverboat safari for close wildlife encounters. Incredible day trip.
SafariElephantsIncluded Day 12
📍 Map
3
Zambezi River Sunset Cruise ⭐ (Day 11)
Hippos, crocodiles, elephants crossing, spectacular sunsets. 3-course dinner included. Truly magical experience.
CruiseWildlifeIncluded Day 11
📍 Map
4
Victoria Falls Bridge
Historic bridge spanning the gorge between Zimbabwe & Zambia. Walk across for views of the gorge & Falls. Bungee jumping available!
BridgeViewsBungee Jumping
📍 Map
5
Elephant Back Safari
Ride elephants through the bush near the Falls. Intimate wildlife experience available through most Victoria Falls hotels.
ElephantsSafariOptional Extra
📍 Map
🚗 Getting Around
Note: Uber & Bolt both operate in Cape Town & Johannesburg. Lyft does NOT operate in Africa. In Victoria Falls, use hotel taxis or arranged transfers.
🚖
Bolt (Best in Africa)
The #1 ride-hailing app across Africa. Generally cheaper than Uber. Works in Cape Town and Johannesburg. Download before you go!
✅ Cape Town ✅ Johannesburg ❌ Victoria Falls ❌ Kruger Area
📲 Download Bolt App
🚗
Uber
Also available in Cape Town and Johannesburg. App works the same as the US. Sign into your existing US account — no new signup needed.
✅ Cape Town ✅ Johannesburg ❌ Victoria Falls ❌ Kruger Area
📲 Open Uber App
🏨
Hotel Taxis & Transfers
Recommended for Victoria Falls and Kruger. Your tour guide or hotel concierge can arrange safe, reliable transfers. Always agree on price before entering unlicensed taxis.
✅ Victoria Falls ✅ Kruger Area ✅ All Cities
🚌
Tour Vehicle (Included)
Your Afri Tours guide will be with you Days 3–13 with an air-conditioned vehicle for all included activities. No need to arrange separate transport for touring days.
✅ All Tour Days (3–12)
📞 Guide: +27 76 590 4460
⚠️
Safety Tips
Always use Bolt/Uber or hotel-arranged taxis. Avoid unmarked/unlicensed taxis especially at night. In Cape Town, MyCiTi bus is a safe public option for daytime. Never walk with valuables visible.
✈️ Ethiopian Airlines
Your primary carrier for international flights throughout this trip.
🌐 Website 📞 US: 1-800-445-2733
Your Flight Schedule
IAD✈️ADD
Apr 18 · Depart 10:55 AM · Ethiopian Airlines · Duration 13h 15m · Overnight
ADD✈️JNB
Apr 19 · Depart 8:45 AM · Arrive 1:05 PM · Duration 5h 20m
MQP✈️CPT
Apr 22 · Kruger–Nelspruit → Cape Town · Domestic (~2.5 hrs)
CPT✈️VFA
Apr 28 · Cape Town → Victoria Falls · (~2 hrs)
VFA✈️ADD
Apr 30 · Depart 1:05 PM · Arrive 9:40 PM · Duration 7h 35m
ADD✈️IAD
Apr 30 · Depart 10:50 PM · Arrive May 1 at 8:55 AM · Duration 17h 5m
Baggage tip: Ethiopian Airlines international allowance is typically 1 checked bag (23kg) in economy. Confirm with your booking. Domestic SA flights may have lower limits (~15kg). Travel light!
Check-in: Online check-in opens 48 hours before departure. Download the Ethiopian Airlines app for mobile boarding passes.
📍 Airport Maps
📍 Dulles (IAD) 📍 Addis Ababa (ADD) 📍 Johannesburg (JNB) 📍 Kruger/Nelspruit (MQP) 📍 Cape Town (CPT) 📍 Victoria Falls (VFA)
📱 Apps to Download NOW
Bolt — Ride-hailing (better than Uber in SA)
Uber — Ride-hailing backup
Ethiopian Airlines — Boarding passes & flight tracking
XE Currency — Live exchange rates (works offline)
Google Translate — Download Afrikaans, Zulu, Shona offline packs
WhatsApp — Guide will likely communicate via WhatsApp
📡 Cell Service & Data
Check with your carrier (Verizon/AT&T/T-Mobile) about international roaming before you leave. South Africa and Zimbabwe have good 4G coverage in cities. Alternatively, buy a local SIM card at the airport (MTN or Vodacom in SA) for much cheaper data rates.
🔌 Power Adapters
South Africa uses Type M plugs (large 3-pin). Zimbabwe also uses Type D/G. Bring a universal travel adapter. Voltage is 230V (US is 110V) — most modern phone chargers handle this automatically.
💊 Medications
Status: Tap the button above to enable alerts. You'll get a notification when it's time to take your medicine!
➕ Add a Medication
💊
No medications added yet.
Add your medications above to get timed reminders during the trip.
✅ Recommended Medications & Prep
💡 Before You Go: Make an appointment with your medical professional to ensure all vaccinations are up-to-date. Tell them which countries you're visiting (South Africa, Zimbabwe, Botswana).
Walter Reed Hospital International Travel Clinic reviewed health status and recommended 3 vaccines + a prescription for this trip.
🏢 No Travel Doctor? Try Passport Health
Locations across the U.S. offering travel medicine, immunizations & more. If they're "Out of Network" for your insurance, they'll help you get reimbursed.
🌐 Passport Health Website
🌡️ Fall Season Temperatures
Day: 25°C–30°C (77°F–86°F)
Evening: 15°C–20°C (59°F–68°F)
👕 Clothing
☑️ Layered clothing (light days, cool evenings)
☑️ Hat & fan
☑️ Sturdy walking shoes
☑️ Cotton material (best for heat)
☑️ Long pants & socks (required for safari)
☑️ Sweaters & jackets for evenings
☑️ Fanny pack / money belt (under shirt, for passport & cash)
⚠️ Color Warnings
🚫 Avoid white — attracts insects
🚫 Avoid blue & black — attract tsetse flies
🚫 Avoid bright colors — can trigger animals
✅ Best colors: Cream, tan, brown, khaki, olive green
🔌 Electrical Plugs
South Africa uses Type C, D, M & N plugs. Voltage: 230V / 50Hz (US is 110V). Most modern phone & laptop chargers handle 230V automatically. Bring a universal travel adapter — available on Amazon or Best Buy.
📦 Pack in original containers — this is required for prescriptions and recommended for all medications when going through customs.
💊 Over-the-Counter
☑️ Aspirin
☑️ Tylenol (Acetaminophen)
☑️ Aleve (Naproxen)
☑️ Dramamine (motion sickness)
☑️ Pepto-Bismol (upset stomach)
☑️ Tums / Rolaids (antacids)
☑️ Imodium (anti-diarrheal)
☑️ Anti-histamines (Benadryl, Zyrtec, Claritin)
☑️ Personal prescriptions
🧴 Topical Medications
☑️ Bug spray with DEET
☑️ Sunscreen / Suntan lotion
☑️ Benadryl cream
☑️ Antiseptic cream or spray
☑️ Calamine lotion
🦟 DEET Note for Safari
Use at least 20–30% DEET bug spray at Kruger, Chobe, and Botswana. Apply at dawn and dusk. Tsetse flies are NOT a concern at Kruger National Park.
💊
Medication Time!
Time to take your medication.
ℹ️ Essential Info
🆘 Universal Emergency: Dial 112 from any cell phone in South Africa & Zimbabwe. It works even without signal or SIM.
🇿🇦 South Africa — Emergency Numbers
🚨 Police
Call 10111
🚑 Ambulance
Call 10177
📱 Cell Emergency (all services)
Call 112
🔥 Fire
Call 10111
🇺🇸 U.S. Consulates — South Africa
US Embassy — Pretoria (Main)
877 Pretorius St, Arcadia, Pretoria
📞 Call
US Consulate — Johannesburg
1 Sandton Drive, Sandhurst
📞 Call
US Consulate — Cape Town
2 Reddam Ave, Westlake, Cape Town
📞 Call
US Citizen Emergency (After Hours)
For lost passport, arrest, hospitalization
📞 Call
🏥 Hospitals — South Africa
Netcare Milpark Hospital — Johannesburg
Private, excellent. Near OR Tambo area.
📞 Call
Mediclinic Morningside — Johannesburg
Top private hospital, Sandton area
📞 Call
Mediclinic Nelspruit — Kruger Area
Nearest private hospital to Kruger Park
📞 Call
Hoedspruit Private Hospital — Kruger Area
Close to the park gate
📞 Call
Netcare Christiaan Barnard — Cape Town
City Bowl, Cape Town. Top private hospital.
📞 Call
Mediclinic Cape Town
Hof Street, Gardens, Cape Town
📞 Call
Groote Schuur Hospital — Cape Town
World-famous public hospital (site of first heart transplant)
📞 Call
🇿🇼 Zimbabwe — Emergency Numbers
🚨 Police
Call 995
🚑 Ambulance
Call 994
📱 General Emergency
Call 999
🇺🇸 U.S. Embassy — Zimbabwe
US Embassy — Harare (nearest to Vic Falls)
2 Lorraine Drive, Bluffhill, Harare · ~5 hrs from Vic Falls
📞 Call
US Citizen Emergency Line
Lost passport, medical emergencies, arrest
📞 Call
🏥 Hospitals — Victoria Falls Area
Victoria Falls Hospital
Livingstone Way, Victoria Falls. Basic care.
📞 Call
Shearwater Medical Center
Tourist-focused clinic in Victoria Falls town
📞 Call
⚠️ For serious emergencies
Medevac to Johannesburg is common for serious cases. Ask hotel to arrange or contact your travel insurance.
🇪🇹 Ethiopia — Addis Ababa (Layover Only)
US Embassy — Addis Ababa
Entoto Street, Addis Ababa
📞 Call
Addis Ababa Police
Call 991
🇧🇼 Botswana — Chobe Day Trip
US Embassy — Gaborone
Embassy Drive, Gaborone (guided day trip, guide handles emergencies)
📞 Call
Emergency (Police/Ambulance)
Call 999
📞 Your Tour Company — Afri Tours & Travel
Main Contact
+27 76 590 4460 · sales@afritoursandtravel.co.za
📞 Call
WhatsApp (recommended in Africa)
Use WhatsApp to message the guide — cheaper than SMS
💬 WhatsApp
April–May is autumn in the Southern Hemisphere. Expect warm days, cooler nights. Great time to visit! Tap a city for a live forecast.
🏙️ Johannesburg (Apr 19–20)
22°C / 72°F
Partly cloudy · Afternoon thunderstorms possible
🌡️ Low: 12°C / 54°F💧 Humidity: 55%
📡 Live Forecast
🦁 Kruger National Park (Apr 20–22)
28°C / 82°F
Warm & dry · Excellent for game viewing · Cool nights
🌡️ Low: 14°C / 57°F☀️ Mostly sunny
What to wear: Light layers · Long sleeves for evening safari (mosquitoes) · Neutral earth tones
📡 Live Forecast
🏔️ Cape Town (Apr 22–28)
18°C / 64°F
Autumn · Mix of sun & showers · Beautiful & mild
🌡️ Low: 11°C / 52°F🌬️ Can be windy
What to wear: Light jacket & layers · Rain jacket handy · Comfortable walking shoes
⚠️ Table Mountain tip: Cable car closes in high winds — have a backup plan for Day 6!
📡 Live Forecast
🍷 Stellenbosch (Apr 27)
20°C / 68°F
Gorgeous autumn foliage on the vineyards · Mild & beautiful
🌡️ Low: 10°C / 50°F🍂 Autumn harvest season
📡 Live Forecast
💧 Victoria Falls (Apr 28–30)
26°C / 79°F
End of rainy season — Falls at PEAK FLOW! Spray is intense — bring a raincoat!
🌡️ Low: 16°C / 61°F💦 Heavy spray from Falls
⚠️ Packing tip: Bring a waterproof jacket or buy a cheap poncho at the Falls entrance — you WILL get soaked!
📡 Live Forecast
Packing Checklist for Weather: Sunscreen (strong — African sun is intense), sunglasses, light layers, 1 warm jacket, rain jacket, comfortable walking shoes & sandals, hat.
Exchange rates below are approximate for April 2026. Tap here for live rates (XE.com). Download the XE Currency app for offline access.
🇿🇦 South African Rand (ZAR)
🇿🇦
$1 USD ≈ R18–19 ZAR
Used in Johannesburg, Kruger, Cape Town, Stellenbosch
❌ USD not widely accepted — exchange or use card
Tips:
• Use ATMs (Nedbank, ABSA, Standard Bank) — best rates
• Notify your bank before travel to avoid card blocks
• Credit cards widely accepted in hotels, restaurants, shops
• Keep small Rand notes for tips (R20–50 per service)
💱 Live USD → ZAR
🇿🇼 Zimbabwe (USD primary)
🇿🇼
$1 USD = $1 USD 🎉
Victoria Falls uses US Dollars as the main currency
✅ USD widely accepted & preferred!
Tips:
• Bring small US bills (ones, fives, tens) — change is hard to get
• Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) also in use but USD is king for tourists
• Victoria Falls visa: ~$50 USD cash at airport
• Tips in USD are always appreciated
🇧🇼 Botswana Pula (BWP)
🇧🇼
$1 USD ≈ 13–14 BWP
Chobe day trip only — lodge may accept USD or ZAR
❌ USD not widely accepted for small purchases
Your Chobe lunch is included — minimal spending needed. Tour guide will advise on any small purchases.
💱 Live USD → BWP
🇪🇹 Ethiopian Birr (ETB)
🇪🇹
$1 USD ≈ 55–57 ETB
Addis Ababa airport layover only — USD accepted at airport
✅ USD accepted at Bole Airport
Layover is short (1h35m and 1h10m). Airport shops and cafes accept USD. No need to exchange.
💡 Money Tips for Seniors Abroad
• Tell your bank about your travel dates before departing
• Bring two cards (in case one is lost or blocked)
• Keep $200 USD cash on hand for Zimbabwe & emergencies
• ATMs are widely available in Cape Town & Johannesburg
• Don't exchange money at the airport — rates are poor. Use ATMs or hotel.
• Keep receipts from currency exchanges
Good news! English is an official language in South Africa, Zimbabwe & Botswana — and widely spoken at all hotels, restaurants, and tourist sites. Your guide speaks fluent English too!
🇿🇦 South African English
South Africa (Johannesburg, Kruger, Cape Town, Stellenbosch)
English is one of 11 official languages. You'll have no trouble communicating! Here are some fun local words:
Local WordMeaning
BraaiBarbecue (very important!)
LekkerGreat, nice, awesome
HowzitHow are you? / Hello
Eish!Oh no! / Wow!
Bru / BoetFriend / Brother
RobotTraffic light!
JaYes (Afrikaans)
DankieThank you (Afrikaans)
SawubonaHello (Zulu)
NgiyabongaThank you (Zulu)
🌐 Afrikaans Translator 🌐 Zulu Translator
🇿🇼 English & Shona — Zimbabwe
Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe
English is official. Shona is the most widely spoken local language. A few helpful Shona phrases:
Shona PhraseEnglish
MhoroHello
Makadii?How are you?
NdiripoI am fine
TatendaThank you
NdapotaPlease
Chisarai zvakanakaGoodbye / Go well
MvuraWater
ChikafuFood
🌐 Shona Translator
🇧🇼 English & Setswana — Botswana
Chobe National Park Day Trip
English is widely spoken. A few Setswana phrases your guide will appreciate:
SetswanaEnglish
DumelaHello / Good day
Ke a lebogaThank you
Go siameOK / That's fine
EeYes
NnyaaNo
🇪🇹 Amharic — Ethiopia
Addis Ababa (Layover only — airport staff speak English)
Airport staff all speak English. Just in case:
AmharicEnglish
SelamHello / Peace
AmeseginalehuThank you
AwoYes
YellemNo
🌐 Amharic Translator
🌐 Universal Translation Tool
Google Translate works for all these languages. Download the offline packs before you go so it works without internet.
Open Google Translate

Zimbabwe e-Visa Portal
evisa.gov.zw · Payment Service
›
🌿 Zimbabwe e-Visa Details
Type: KAZA UniVisa (covers Zimbabwe + Botswana)
Cost: USD $50 per person
Validity: 30 days, single entry each country
Entry Point: Victoria Falls Airport / Border
Processing: Available on arrival or apply online

💊 Medications — Robin Harper
💊
Atorvastatin 80 mg
Generic for Lipitor · Once daily
›
Drug Class: Statin (HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor)
Brand Name: Lipitor
Dose: 80 mg — one tablet by mouth once daily
Purpose: Cholesterol management / cardiovascular risk reduction
RX #: 6463387 · Costco Pharmacy
Manufacturer: NOVADOZ PH
Refills: 1 refill of 90 remaining before 05/20/2026
⚠️ Take at same time each day. Avoid grapefruit juice. Report unexplained muscle pain.
💊
Amlodipine Besylate 5 mg
Generic for Norvasc · Once daily
›
Drug Class: Calcium channel blocker (CCB)
Brand Name: Norvasc
Dose: 5 mg — one tablet by mouth once daily
Purpose: Blood pressure / angina management
RX #: 6468182 · Costco Pharmacy
Manufacturer: ASCEND LABS
Refills: 1 refill of 90 remaining
⚠️ May cause ankle swelling or flushing. Do not stop abruptly.
💊
Spironolactone 25 mg
Generic for Aldactone · Once daily
›
Drug Class: Potassium-sparing diuretic / aldosterone antagonist
Brand Name: Aldactone
Dose: 25 mg — one tablet by mouth once daily
Purpose: Fluid balance / heart failure / blood pressure
RX #: 6480405 · Costco Pharmacy
Manufacturer: NORTHSTAR
Refills: 3 refills of 90 remaining
⚠️ Monitor potassium. Avoid excess potassium-rich foods (bananas, potatoes). Stay hydrated.
💊
Valsartan 80 mg
Generic for Diovan · Once daily
›
Drug Class: Angiotensin receptor blocker (ARB)
Brand Name: Diovan
Dose: 80 mg — one tablet by mouth once daily
Purpose: Blood pressure / heart failure / kidney protection
RX #: 6463386 · Costco Pharmacy
Manufacturer: CAMBER PH
Refills: See label
⚠️ Do not take with ACE inhibitors. Stay hydrated. Avoid NSAIDs if possible.
💊
Ticagrelor 90 mg
Generic for Brilinta · Once daily
›
Drug Class: P2Y12 receptor inhibitor (antiplatelet)
Brand Name: Brilinta
Dose: 90 mg — one tablet by mouth once daily
Purpose: Prevention of blood clots / heart attack / stroke
NDC: 62332-241-60 · 60 tablets
Manufacturer: Alembic
🚨 CRITICAL: Do NOT skip doses. Do not take aspirin >100 mg/day. Report unusual bleeding. Do not stop without physician guidance.
